{{Infobox character
| name = President Vallenar
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[President Vallenar]] is the leader of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[President Vallenar]] is addressed by [[The Voice]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
